title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PUERTO PRINCESA PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE CITY OF PUERTO PRINCESA, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, FROM A FIFTY-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL INTO A SEVENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6581 / 88 OG No. 23, 3478 (June 8, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7413, April 14, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE PUERTO PRINCESA PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE CITY OF PUERTO PRINCESA, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, FROM A FIFTY-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL INTO A SEVENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Puerto Princesa Provincial Hospital in the City of Puerto Princesa, Province of Palawan, is hereby increased from fifty (50) to seventy-five (75) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 7, 1992, and December 10, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 14, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON A. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
